desc: Ishq Junooni tells of a couple brought together by accident. Fate leads to an unexpected marriage, with conflict, healing, and eventual deep, lasting love together.

desc: The show follows Puja as she navigates a complex love triangle with two lovers, exploring emotions, loyalties, and choices that test friendship, trust, and happiness together.

desc: A lighthearted drama exploring marital relationships with humor and emotion, depicting misunderstandings, growth, and the journey of a couple learning about love and responsibility.

desc: The show traces the journey of Preeto, third daughter of Sodi family who shoulders the responsibilities like the son of the family.

title: Ram Ratan Dhan Payo
desc: Join us for a lively event where devoted fans come together to sing uplifting hymns in celebration of God, creating a beautiful atmosphere of community and faith!

title: Man Atisundar
desc: Radhika, Ruchita's cousin, deals with weight-based rejections. Promo hints at Nihar's comforting, indicating a unique love story. Show follows Radhika's journey, embracing her as herself.
